changes: Rewrote BranchDetail presentation to match screenshot 16. Replaced old Header with ScreenHeader (back + title + green 'Editar' text button on right). View mode: white rounded-[18px] shadow-sm card with icon-based InfoRows (Building2, MapPin, Navigation, Phone, User). Added 'Turmas desta filial . N' section heading with ListRow items for each class (UsersRound icon, days/time/students subtitle, chevron). Added '+ Nova turma' secondary button. Added 'Acoes' section heading with 'Arquivar filial' ghost button and 'Excluir filial' ghost button (disabled/fg-4 when turmas exist, loss color when deletable). Added Lock icon footnote for branches with active classes. Used useClasses(branchId) to fetch related teams. Edit mode preserved with Field/Input form. All hooks, navigation, mutations, Sheet confirm dialog preserved.
